CVE-2020-10573.title: An issue was discovered in Janus through 0.9.1. janus_audiobridge ...
CVE-2020-10573.description: An issue was discovered in Janus through 0.9.1. janus_audiobridge.c has a double mutex unlock when listing private rooms in AudioBridge.

CVE-2020-10574.title: An issue was discovered in Janus through 0.9.1. janus.c tries to  ...
CVE-2020-10574.description: An issue was discovered in Janus through 0.9.1. janus.c tries to use a string that doesn't actually exist during a "query_logger" Admin API request, because of a typo in the JSON validation.

CVE-2020-10575.title: An issue was discovered in Janus through 0.9.1. plugins/janus_vid ...
CVE-2020-10575.description: An issue was discovered in Janus through 0.9.1. plugins/janus_videocall.c in the VideoCall plugin mishandles session management because a race condition causes some references to be freed too early or too many times.

CVE-2020-10576.title: An issue was discovered in Janus through 0.9.1. plugins/janus_voi ...
CVE-2020-10576.description: An issue was discovered in Janus through 0.9.1. plugins/janus_voicemail.c in the VoiceMail plugin has a race condition that could cause a server crash.

CVE-2020-10577.title: An issue was discovered in Janus through 0.9.1. janus.c has multi ...
CVE-2020-10577.description: An issue was discovered in Janus through 0.9.1. janus.c has multiple concurrent threads that misuse the source property of a session, leading to a race condition when claiming sessions.

CVE-2020-13898.title: An issue was discovered in janus-gateway (aka Janus WebRTC Server ...
CVE-2020-13898.description: An issue was discovered in janus-gateway (aka Janus WebRTC Server) through 0.10.0. janus_sdp_process in sdp.c has a NULL pointer dereference.

CVE-2020-13899.title: An issue was discovered in janus-gateway (aka Janus WebRTC Server ...
CVE-2020-13899.description: An issue was discovered in janus-gateway (aka Janus WebRTC Server) through 0.10.0. janus_process_incoming_request in janus.c discloses information from uninitialized stack memory.

CVE-2020-13900.title: An issue was discovered in janus-gateway (aka Janus WebRTC Server ...
CVE-2020-13900.description: An issue was discovered in janus-gateway (aka Janus WebRTC Server) through 0.10.0. janus_sdp_preparse in sdp.c has a NULL pointer dereference.

CVE-2020-13901.title: An issue was discovered in janus-gateway (aka Janus WebRTC Server ...
CVE-2020-13901.description: An issue was discovered in janus-gateway (aka Janus WebRTC Server) through 0.10.0. janus_sdp_merge in sdp.c has a stack-based buffer overflow.

CVE-2020-14033.title: An issue was discovered in janus-gateway (aka Janus WebRTC Server ...
CVE-2020-14033.description: An issue was discovered in janus-gateway (aka Janus WebRTC Server) through 0.10.0. janus_streaming_rtsp_parse_sdp in plugins/janus_streaming.c has a Buffer Overflow via a crafted RTSP server.

CVE-2020-14034.title: An issue was discovered in janus-gateway (aka Janus WebRTC Server ...
CVE-2020-14034.description: An issue was discovered in janus-gateway (aka Janus WebRTC Server) through 0.10.0. janus_get_codec_from_pt in utils.c has a Buffer Overflow via long value in an SDP Offer packet.
